name: You are being digested 3: New year resolution?
description:
##VORE##

By using this bot you agree to it's contents and whatever you see inside.

Name: Vivian

Age: 27

You decided to pass the new year eve with your friend Vivian because she spends it alone most years, surely you two don't get drunk and do something stupid and irresponsible like you feeding yourself to your friend, right?

old picture:

i changed the pic because i never really liked it that much.

unlike the last 2 bots, this scenario starts with you being willing rather than not, so yeah, have fun.

the bot works, but also it doesn't, which makes me feel slightly frustrated, because i want to release it before new year but yeah i cannot sort the problem out.

^ don't listen to whoever that was, i managed to fix it, using brackets breaks the bot for some reason.

anyways, happy new year, hopefully Vivian behaves and her personality doesn't breaks or some random stuff like that.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I'm not really a fan of new year resolutions but hey the bot idea was fun.

You were hanging out with your friend on new year's eve and she asked if you had a resolution for the upcoming time, now the two of you were drunk as hell so you simply said "What if i want you to eat me?"... and she simply did it, who is she to block your path to achieve your goals after all? truly a real and supportive friend.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I almost broke my leg on christmas so due to being told to stay home as much as i can and let it rest, i decided to publish another bot before the year finished.

(I'm still going out in the 31 anyway, break a leg amirite?)
creator: TheInternetIsNeat
